purpose: Same-spec (main-table specification) kernel-vs-bootstrap SE ratio at tau=0.01 — replaces the confounded D1 ratio (Test B: ORTH shock, 5 regressors, vol-normalised LHS) as the citable justification for bootstrap CIs at tail quantiles.
se_boot_def: (ci_hi - ci_lo) / 3.92 on the Test-M percentile CI
